predictions.reasoning_excerpt:
Looking at the National Weather Service forecast for Miami today, the key information is:
- Forecast high: 81°F
- Hourly progression shows temperatures reaching 80°F multiple times (1pm, 3pm, 4pm, 5pm)
- Peak expected: 80°F around 1pm
- Conditions: Mostly sunny with northeast winds 6-12 mph, gusts to 25 mph

The forecast is very clear - the high temperature will be either 80°F or 81°F. Since we're on the day of resolution, NWS same-day forecasts are highly accurate (typically within 1-2 degrees)
